'''wangaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feaberry|feaberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feaberry|feaberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wangaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wængæbæth|wængæbæth]] || [[word:wængæbæj|wængæbæj]] || [[word:wængæbæsh|wængæbæsh]] || [[word:wængæbæ|wængæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangangabath|wangangabath]] || [[word:wangangabaj|wangangabaj]] || [[word:wangangabash|wangangabash]] || [[word:wangangaba|wangangaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangabath|wangabath]] || [[word:wangabaj|wangabaj]] || [[word:wangabash|wangabash]] || [[word:wangaba|wangaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangafbath|wangafbath]] || [[word:wangafbaj|wangafbaj]] || [[word:wangafbash|wangafbash]] || [[word:wangafbaf|wangafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wangabatha|wangabatha]] || [[word:wangabaja|wangabaja]] || [[word:wangabasha|wangabasha]] || [[word:wangabaka|wangabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wangabath|wangabath]] || [[word:wangabaj|wangabaj]] || [[word:wangabash|wangabash]] || [[word:wangaba|wangaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wangabathal|wangabathal]] || [[word:wangabajal|wangabajal]] || [[word:wangabashal|wangabashal]] || [[word:wangabakal|wangabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wangabathatha|wangabathatha]] || [[word:wangabajaja|wangabajaja]] || [[word:wangabashasha|wangabashasha]] || [[word:wangabaka|wangabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wangabathan|wangabathan]] || [[word:wangabajan|wangabajan]] || [[word:wangabashan|wangabashan]] || [[word:wangabakan|wangabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wangabathaoro|wangabathaoro]] || [[word:wangabajaoro|wangabajaoro]] || [[word:wangabashaoro|wangabashaoro]] || [[word:wangabakaoro|wangabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
